title: PMS Shiny Fabric Bow 20cm x 24cm Red – Large Decorative Bow with Shiny Finish – Christmas Tree, Wreath, Garland, Hamper, and Display Decoration
features: RED SHINY BOW – Classic red colour with a festive shiny finish, perfect for Christmas décor and seasonal arrangements
SHINY FABRIC FINISH – Smooth polyester fabric reflects light beautifully, adding festive sparkle to displays
VERSATILE USE – Ideal for Christmas trees, shop displays, hampers, gift wrapping, and seasonal arrangements
DURABLE AND REUSABLE – Made from 100% polyester, lightweight yet strong enough to be used year after year
FESTIVE ACCESSORY – A stylish decoration that complements both traditional and contemporary festive décor
description: Add a touch of elegance to your festive décor with the PMS Shiny Fabric Bow, a large 20 cm x 24 cm decoration designed to bring sparkle and sophistication to any seasonal display. Made from 100% polyester, this bow has a smooth shiny finish that reflects light beautifully, creating a striking visual effect whether used indoors or outdoors. Its generous size makes it versatile enough to use as a tree topper, a statement wreath bow, or a stylish accent for garlands, hampers, and even retail merchandising. Lightweight yet durable, it is easy to attach and reusable year after year, making it a practical choice for anyone who enjoys decorating with classic festive flair. Whether you’re dressing up your Christmas tree, enhancing a shop window display, or adding a polished finish to a seasonal arrangement, the PMS Shiny Fabric Bow is a timeless accessory that complements both traditional and modern styles. Available in a choice of colours, it allows you to coordinate your decorations perfectly for the festive season.
